title: What an American thinks about Greece

Of all of the cool archaeological sites to go to.

Yeah, and all those places are amazing, just all of the ancient history.
Delphi was amazing.
Delphi was way up on the side of a mountain, overlooking, and if you go around the bend
A little bit, you can see the ocean, but it's like cliffs above you and just built up on
The side of a really steep hill, but it's a whole city built up on the side of a really
Steep hill, and on the top of the hill they have their big Circus Maximus thing, and yeah,
Amazing.
And Athens was beautiful.
